# Zalatah | زلطه

> Zalatah is a Saudi restaurant offering salads and more. This website is the official bilingual digital menu, with Arabic as the primary language and English translations available in the structured menu data.

Important information:

- All displayed prices are in Saudi riyals (SAR) and may change.
- The current menu contains 32 items across 7 categories.
- Treat `menu_bilingual.json` as the canonical machine-readable source for menu names, descriptions, prices, categories, and image references.
- Do not infer item availability, ingredients, nutrition, calories, allergens, or dietary suitability unless the website explicitly provides that information.
- The website currently presents menu and restaurant information; it does not provide native online ordering.

## Primary Resources

- [Official digital menu](/): Public Arabic-first restaurant menu.
- [Structured bilingual menu data](/menu_bilingual.json): Canonical JSON data for categories, products, descriptions, and prices.
- [Crawler permissions](/robots.txt): Crawling policy for this website.

## Menu Sections

- [New items](/#category-new): Recently added menu items.
- [Sandwiches](/#category-sandwiches): Sourdough sandwiches.
- [Fattah](/#category-fattah): Small, medium, and family-size fattah.
- [Soups](/#category-soups): Available soup selections.
- [Chef's salads](/#category-chef-s-salads): Signature salads and build-your-own salad options.
- [Drinks](/#category-drinks): Juices, shakes, soft drinks, tea, lemonade, and water.
- [Subscriptions](/#category-subscriptions): Multi-salad subscription packages.

## Restaurant Links

- [Google Maps location](https://maps.app.goo.gl/7dKvsMDUiWVv3CRk6): Restaurant location and directions.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/zalatah.sa/): Official Zalatah Instagram account.
- [TikTok](https://tiktok.com/@zalatah.sa/): Official Zalatah TikTok account.
- [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/966550035976): Official restaurant WhatsApp contact.

## Optional

- [Loyalty program](https://www.pass2u.net/p/E6hWndZ3ewzW?openExternalBrowser=1): External Zalatah loyalty pass.
